disambiguation_rules.under secretary: Under Secretary of Commerce for Standards and Technology
disambiguation_rules.the director: Director of the Artificial Intelligence Safety Institute
disambiguation_rules.director (section context): In this section: Director of the National Science Foundation (distinct from Director of AISI established in section 101)
disambiguation_rules.secretary (section context): In this section: Secretary of Energy (distinct from Secretary of Commerce referenced elsewhere)
disambiguation_rules.institute (section context): Artificial Intelligence Safety Institute (consistent with earlier sections, established by section 101)
disambiguation_rules.director (section 111 context): Director of the Office of Science and Technology Policy (distinct from Director of AISI and Director of NSF in other sections)

parsing_rules: When 'Definitions' sections redefine terms with local scope, verify against community context to identify scope-specific disambiguations. Multiple definitions of 'Director' and 'Secretary' across sections indicate role context varies by legislative section.

oddities.note: Section 1 contains only the short title and table of contents structure with no substantive content. The Artificial Intelligence Safety Institute is mentioned in the summary but not formally established in the extracted text itself.

llm_disambiguation_log.resolved: Under Secretary of Commerce for Standards and Technology
Director of the Artificial Intelligence Safety Institute
In this section: Director of the National Science Foundation (distinct from Director of AISI established in section 101)
In this section: Secretary of Energy (distinct from Secretary of Commerce referenced elsewhere)
Artificial Intelligence Safety Institute (consistent with earlier sections, established by section 101)
Director of the Office of Science and Technology Policy (distinct from Director of AISI and Director of NSF in other sections)
